name: Dungeon
hints: A dungeon with a dark pit and iron rings in the wall. The pit leads deeper.
The pit is dark - you need a light source. The iron rings might be useful for climbing or tying things.
TIE SHEET to rings, then descend into the pit. You need a lit torch to see down there.
GO PIT (with light) to descend further. TIE SHEETS to the iron rings for a climbing route. UP returns to the workroom.
notes: Dungeon with a dark pit and iron rings. The pit leads to room 18 (deeper pit with torch). Sheets can be tied to the rings. UP returns to the workroom (room 21).
